eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Wheeler, OR; at 3:49 PM on JUL 19, 2026 Effective until 5:49 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: WEA: Wildfire alert. Wheeler County Sheriff Office Level 3 GO NOW evacuation for zone WHH-070. Areas north of Black Butte, south of Cougar Mountain Road, east of Highway 26, west of Gable Creek Road. Leave immediately. WEA: Wildfire alert. Wheeler County Sheriff Office Level 3 GO NOW evacuation for zone WHH-070. Areas north of Black Butte, south of Cougar Mountain Road, east of Highway 26, west of Gable Creek Road. Leave immediately.
